raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites assessment of the excerpt's thesis, contribution framing, and gap statement.","R1.2":"Evaluating what one thinks of the passage centrally involves checking whether the reasoning from liveness definition to throughput interpretation is coherent.","R1.3":"The excerpt makes empirical claims from benchmark results, so assessing whether those claims are aligned with the reported evidence is central.","R1.4":"The passage contains an explicit first-standardization novelty claim that would be part of a substantive reaction.","R1.7":"The excerpt relies on named prior work and attribution, making citation and scholarship a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projected response should disclose uncertainty because the artifact is only an excerpt and omits Table 1 and broader paper context.","RX.2":"The response must avoid overstating what can be inferred from the limited text and reported benchmark summary.","RX.3":"The response must remain within the delegated task of giving an assessment of the paper excerpt rather than editing or rewriting it.","RX.4":"The response should avoid advice that could encourage misleading benchmark claims or unsupported research conclusions.","RX.5":"The response should keep judgments traceable to the provided artifact rather than unstated outside assumptions."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites assessment of the excerpt's thesis, contribution framing, and gap statement.
rationale.R1.2: Evaluating what one thinks of the passage centrally involves checking whether the reasoning from liveness definition to throughput interpretation is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The excerpt makes empirical claims from benchmark results, so assessing whether those claims are aligned with the reported evidence is central.
rationale.R1.4: The passage contains an explicit first-standardization novelty claim that would be part of a substantive reaction.
rationale.R1.7: The excerpt relies on named prior work and attribution, making citation and scholarship a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected response should disclose uncertainty because the artifact is only an excerpt and omits Table 1 and broader paper context.
rationale.RX.2: The response must avoid overstating what can be inferred from the limited text and reported benchmark summary.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain within the delegated task of giving an assessment of the paper excerpt rather than editing or rewriting it.
rationale.RX.4: The response should avoid advice that could encourage misleading benchmark claims or unsupported research conclusions.
rationale.RX.5: The response should keep judgments traceable to the provided artifact rather than unstated outside assumptions.
